summary: Add `podcast master`: standalone de-noise and two-pass loudness normalization for finished podcast episodes.
reason: ElevenLabs does not provide a finished-episode mastering endpoint; externally recorded episodes need local ffmpeg loudness repair and reporting as a hand-authored novel workflow.
